name: @vexa/dashboard-new
description: Fresh modular dashboard, built per the repo brick paradigm: each concern is a self-contained brick under modules/ with one front door (src/index.ts), a README, and a test whose exit code is the signal. The 0.10.6 WS contract (core/gateway/contracts/ws.v1) is the consumed truth. The Next.js app here is the composition root that wires the bricks.

scripts.test:bricks: for b in modules/*/; do (cd "$b" && npm test) || exit 1; done
